title: SMW2 Yoshi's Island - Athletic Theme on Mario Paint Composer v2.0
description:
Turn up your volume.

Recorded by kitchenmaniac111, aka KM.
http://www.youtube.com/user/kitchenmaniac111

Hooray, it didn't take me a month to make a new song this time!

Here's another remake of an old Mario Paint song of mine. This time, I re-did the Obstacle Course or Athletic theme from Yoshi's Island.

I didn't re-do it because I thought my last one was terrible or anything, but because I liked the song so much that I wanted to do it again, this time with the original soundfont. Not to mention I noticed a few things that I DID mess up that I wanted to fix.

Besides the soundfont swap, some changes include:

- Different time signature (in MPC 3/4 now)
- Grace notes
- Better sustain (with Low-A glitch notes and echoes)
- Some instrument changes to better suit the soundfont (MEOW)
- I actually did the whole song

Looking at it this way, it doesn't seem like much changed. Oh well.

Thanks for watching!

EDIT August 30:
#81 - Top Rated (Today) - Music
